scripts.start:bff: pnpm --filter @meta-lc/bff-server... build && sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then exec node --env-file=.env apps/bff-server/dist/apps/bff-server/src/main.js; else exec node apps/bff-server/dist/apps/bff-server/src/main.js; fi'
scripts.infra:up: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis
